---
title: "RUN_ME"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Run Shiny App

```{r}
library(shiny)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(purrr)

# Keywords in protocol order (for display ordering and abstract highlighting)
code_keywords <- c("code", "script", "osf", "github", "supplement",
                   "replicate", "reproduce", "zenodo", "appendix")

# Data file â€” update this path to match your batch file
data_file <- "1-100_Lieke-Marcel.rds"

if (file.exists(data_file)) {
  input_data <- readRDS(data_file)
} else {
  stop(paste("Data file not found:", data_file))
}

# Add screening columns if absent (allows loading old RDS files)
new_cols <- c("code_available", "code_sufficiency", "code_location",
              "no_code_reason", "programming_language",
              "programming_language_other", "note")
for (col in new_cols) {
  if (!col %in% names(input_data)) input_data[[col]] <- NA_character_
}

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Helpers
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Wrap bare URLs in the text with clickable <a> tags
linkify <- function(text) {
  if (is.na(text) || nchar(text) == 0) return(text)
  str_replace_all(text,
    "(https?://[^\\s<>\"'\\)\\]]+)",
    '<a href="\\1" target="_blank">\\1</a>')
}

# Bold every code keyword and linkify URLs in an abstract string
highlight_abstract <- function(text, keywords) {
  if (is.na(text) || nchar(text) == 0) return(text)
  for (kw in keywords) {
    text <- str_replace_all(text,
      regex(paste0("\\b", kw, "\\b"), ignore_case = TRUE),
      paste0("<strong>", kw, "</strong>"))
  }
  linkify(text)
}

# Persist the currently-displayed article's inputs back into rv$data and save
save_current <- function(rv, input) {
  idx   <- rv$current_page
  data  <- rv$data

  ca <- input[[paste0("code_available_", idx)]]
  if (!is.null(ca)) {
    data$code_available[idx] <- if (ca == "not_assessed") NA_character_ else ca

    if (ca == "yes") {
      cs <- input[[paste0("code_sufficiency_", idx)]]
      cl <- input[[paste0("code_location_",   idx)]]
      if (!is.null(cs)) data$code_sufficiency[idx] <- cs
      if (!is.null(cl)) data$code_location[idx]    <- cl
      # Clear mutually exclusive fields
      data$no_code_reason[idx]              <- NA_character_
      data$programming_language[idx]        <- NA_character_
      data$programming_language_other[idx]  <- NA_character_

    } else if (ca == "no") {
      nr <- input[[paste0("no_code_reason_",           idx)]]
      pl <- input[[paste0("programming_language_",     idx)]]
      po <- input[[paste0("programming_language_other_", idx)]]
      if (!is.null(nr)) data$no_code_reason[idx]       <- nr
      if (!is.null(pl)) data$programming_language[idx] <- pl
      if (!is.null(pl) && pl == "Other" && !is.null(po))
        data$programming_language_other[idx] <- po
      else
        data$programming_language_other[idx] <- NA_character_
      # Clear mutually exclusive fields
      data$code_sufficiency[idx] <- NA_character_
      data$code_location[idx]    <- NA_character_

    } else {
      # not_assessed â€” clear everything
      data$code_sufficiency[idx]            <- NA_character_
      data$code_location[idx]               <- NA_character_
      data$no_code_reason[idx]              <- NA_character_
      data$programming_language[idx]        <- NA_character_
      data$programming_language_other[idx]  <- NA_character_
    }
  }

  nt <- input[[paste0("note_", idx)]]
  if (!is.null(nt)) data$note[idx] <- nt

  rv$data <- data
  saveRDS(rv$data, data_file)
}

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# UI
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
ui <- fluidPage(
  titlePanel("Code Availability Screening"),

  fixedPanel(
    top = 0, left = 0, right = 0, height = "140px",
    style = "background-color: white; z-index: 1000; padding: 10px; border-bottom: 1px solid #ccc;",

    fluidRow(
      column(12, h4("Code Availability Review"))
    ),
    fluidRow(
      column(2, actionButton("prev_page",       "Previous")),
      column(2, actionButton("next_page",       "Next")),
      column(2, actionButton("next_unscreened", "Next Unscreened")),
      column(2, actionButton("save_inputs",     "Save")),
      column(2, numericInput("jump_page", "Jump to:", value = 1, min = 1, step = 1, width = "80px")),
      column(2, actionButton("go_page", "Go"))
    ),
    fluidRow(
      column(12, textOutput("page_info"))
    )
  ),

  tags$div(
    style = paste(
      "margin-top: 150px;",
      "margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;",
      "padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;",
      "max-width: 900px; font-size: 1.2em;"
    ),
    uiOutput("article_display")
  )
)

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Server
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
server <- function(input, output, session) {

  rv <- reactiveValues(
    data         = input_data,
    current_page = 1
  )

  # Start on the first article where code_available has not been set
  {
    unscreened <- which(is.na(input_data$code_available))
    rv$current_page <- if (length(unscreened) > 0) min(unscreened) else 1
  }

  total_pages <- reactive(nrow(rv$data))

  # -- Navigation (each saves before moving) ----------------------------------

  observeEvent(input$prev_page, {
    save_current(rv, input)
    if (rv$current_page > 1) rv$current_page <- rv$current_page - 1
  })

  observeEvent(input$next_page, {
    save_current(rv, input)
    if (rv$current_page < total_pages()) rv$current_page <- rv$current_page + 1
  })

  observeEvent(input$next_unscreened, {
    save_current(rv, input)
    start      <- rv$current_page + 1
    unscreened <- which(is.na(rv$data$code_available))
    next_idx   <- unscreened[unscreened >= start][1]
    if (!is.na(next_idx)) {
      rv$current_page <- next_idx
    } else {
      showNotification("No more unscreened articles.", type = "message")
    }
  })

  observeEvent(input$go_page, {
    req(input$jump_page)
    save_current(rv, input)
    p <- as.integer(input$jump_page)
    if (p >= 1 && p <= total_pages()) {
      rv$current_page <- p
    } else {
      showNotification("Invalid page number.", type = "error")
    }
  })

  # Manual save
  observeEvent(input$save_inputs, {
    save_current(rv, input)
    showNotification("Saved!", type = "message")
  })

  # Keep the jump-to input in sync with the current page
  observe({
    updateNumericInput(session, "jump_page",
                       value = rv$current_page, min = 1, max = total_pages())
  })

  output$page_info <- renderText({
    screened <- sum(!is.na(rv$data$code_available))
    paste0("Article ", rv$current_page, " of ", total_pages(),
           "  |  Screened: ", screened, " / ", total_pages())
  })

  # -- Article display --------------------------------------------------------
  output$article_display <- renderUI({
    idx     <- rv$current_page
    article <- rv$data[idx, ]

    keyword_df <- article$keyword_data[[1]]

    bold_abstract <- highlight_abstract(article$abstract, code_keywords)

    # Current saved values (with safe defaults for UI initialisation)
    ca  <- ifelse(is.na(article$code_available),           "not_assessed",   article$code_available)
    cs  <- ifelse(is.na(article$code_sufficiency),         "sufficient",     article$code_sufficiency)
    cl  <- ifelse(is.na(article$code_location),            "",               article$code_location)
    nr  <- ifelse(is.na(article$no_code_reason),           "no_mention",     article$no_code_reason)
    pl  <- ifelse(is.na(article$programming_language),     "",               article$programming_language)
    plo <- ifelse(is.na(article$programming_language_other), "",             article$programming_language_other)
    nt  <- ifelse(is.na(article$note),                     "",               article$note)

    tagList(

      # -- Article metadata ---------------------------------------------------
      h3(article$title),
      p(strong("DOI Link: "),
        tags$a(href = article$`DOI Link`, target = "_blank", article$`DOI Link`)),
      p(strong("DOI: "), article$DOI),

      h4("Abstract"),
      p(HTML(bold_abstract)),

      # -- Keyword matches (in protocol order) --------------------------------
      if (!is.null(keyword_df) && nrow(keyword_df) > 0) {
        tagList(
          h4("Keyword Matches"),
          tagList(lapply(code_keywords, function(kw) {
            contexts <- keyword_df$context[keyword_df$keyword == kw]
            if (length(contexts) == 0) return(NULL)
            tagList(
              h5(strong(kw)),
              tags$ul(lapply(contexts, function(ctx) {
                ctx_hl <- str_replace_all(
                  ctx,
                  regex(paste0("\\b", kw, "\\b"), ignore_case = TRUE),
                  paste0("<strong>", kw, "</strong>"))
                ctx_hl <- linkify(ctx_hl)
                tags$li(HTML(ctx_hl))
              }))
            )
          }))
        )
      } else {
        p(em("No keyword matches found for this article."))
      },

      hr(),
      h4("Code Availability Assessment"),

      # -- Step 1: Is code available? -----------------------------------------
      radioButtons(
        inputId  = paste0("code_available_", idx),
        label    = "Is any code available?",
        choices  = c("Not yet assessed" = "not_assessed",
                     "Yes"              = "yes",
                     "No"               = "no"),
        selected = ca
      ),

      # -- If YES: sufficiency + location -------------------------------------
      conditionalPanel(
        condition = sprintf("input['code_available_%d'] === 'yes'", idx),
        radioButtons(
          inputId  = paste0("code_sufficiency_", idx),
          label    = "Code sufficiency:",
          choices  = c(
            "The code that is available could be sufficient to reproduce the simulation."                   = "sufficient",
            "Some code is available, but it is clearly insufficient to reproduce the simulation(s) in the article." = "insufficient"
          ),
          selected = cs
        ),
        textInput(
          inputId = paste0("code_location_", idx),
          label   = "Code location (paste URL or describe):",
          value   = cl,
          width   = "100%"
        )
      ),

      # -- If NO: reason + programming language -------------------------------
      conditionalPanel(
        condition = sprintf("input['code_available_%d'] === 'no'", idx),
        radioButtons(
          inputId  = paste0("no_code_reason_", idx),
          label    = "Why is no code available?",
          choices  = c(
            "Authors mention code sharing but the code is not retrievable (e.g., broken link, private repository)" = "not_retrievable",
            "No mention of code sharing in the article"                                                             = "no_mention"
          ),
          selected = nr
        ),
        selectInput(
          inputId  = paste0("programming_language_", idx),
          label    = "Programming language used in the simulation study:",
          choices  = c("Select..." = "", "R", "Python", "MATLAB", "Stata", "SAS", "C/C++", "Julia", "Other"),
          selected = pl
        ),
        conditionalPanel(
          condition = sprintf("input['programming_language_%d'] === 'Other'", idx),
          textInput(
            inputId = paste0("programming_language_other_", idx),
            label   = "Specify programming language:",
            value   = plo,
            width   = "100%"
          )
        )
      ),

      # -- Notes (always visible) ---------------------------------------------
      textAreaInput(
        inputId = paste0("note_", idx),
        label   = "Notes:",
        value   = nt,
        width   = "100%",
        rows    = 5
      ),

      hr()
    )
  })
}

shinyApp(ui = ui, server = server)
```
